1874
1875 for (const auto &import : module.info->imports) {
1876 if (!import.moduleAlias.empty() && import.targetModuleIds.size() != 1) {
1877 if (!allowIncomplete) {
1878 error(import.span, "Module alias imports are only allowed when the "
1879 "path resolves to a single module.");
1880 }
1881 continue;
1882 }
1883
1884 for (const auto &targetId : import.targetModuleIds) {
1885 auto targetIt = modules_.find(targetId);
1886 if (targetIt == modules_.end()) {
1887 continue;
1888 }
1889
1890 auto &target = targetIt->second;
1891 auto alias = import.moduleAlias.empty() ? target.info->moduleName
1892 : import.moduleAlias;
1893
1894 auto existingOwner = namespaceOwners.find(alias);
1895 if (existingOwner != namespaceOwners.end() &&
1896 existingOwner->second != targetId) {
1897 if (!allowIncomplete) {
1898 error(import.span, "Import namespace '" + alias +
1899 "' is ambiguous because multiple files share "
1900 "that module name.");
1901 }
1902 continue;
1903 }
1904
1905 if (!module.scope->lookupLocal(alias)) {
1906 module.scope->declare(alias, target.symbol);
1907 namespaceOwners[alias] = targetId;
1908 } else if (module.scope->lookupLocal(alias) != target.symbol) {
1909 if (!allowIncomplete) {
1910 error(import.span, "Cannot import module '" + alias +
1911 "' because that name is already declared in "
1912 "the current file.");
1913 }
1914 continue;
1915 }
1916
1917 if (import.bindings.empty()) {
1918 if (import.visibility == Visibility::Public) {
1919 module.symbol->exports[alias] = target.symbol;
1920 for (const auto &exported : target.symbol->exports) {
1921 module.symbol->exports[exported.first] = exported.second;
1922 }
1923 }
1924 continue;
1925 }
1926
1927 if (import.targetModuleIds.size() != 1) {
1928 if (!allowIncomplete) {
1929 error(import.span, "Selective imports are only allowed when the path "
1930 "resolves to a single module.");
1931 }
1932 continue;
1933 }
1934
1935 for (const auto &binding : import.bindings) {
1936 auto exportedIt = target.symbol->exports.find(binding.sourceName);
1937 if (exportedIt == target.symbol->exports.end()) {
1938 if (allowIncomplete) {
1939 continue;
1940 }
1941 auto memberIt = target.symbol->members.find(binding.sourceName);
1942 if (memberIt != target.symbol->members.end() &&
1943 memberIt->second->visibility != Visibility::Public) {
1944 error(import.span, "Member '" + binding.sourceName +
1945 "' of module '" + alias + "' is private.");
1946 } else {
1947 error(import.span, "Module '" + alias + "' has no public member '" +
1948 binding.sourceName + "'.");
1949 }
1950 continue;
1951 }
1952
1953 auto existing = module.scope->lookupLocal(binding.localName);
1954 if (existing && existing != exportedIt->second) {
1955 if (!allowIncomplete) {
1956 error(import.span, "Imported name '" + binding.localName +
1957 "' conflicts with an existing declaration "
1958 "in the current file.");
1959 }
1960 continue;
1961 }
1962 if (!existing) {
1963 module.scope->declare(binding.localName, exportedIt->second);
1964 }
1965 if (import.visibility == Visibility::Public) {
1966 module.symbol->exports[binding.localName] = exportedIt->second;
1967 }
1968 }
1969 }
1970 }
1971}

4021 if (!calleeId) {
4022 return false;
4023 }
4024
4025 const bool isLock = calleeId->value_ == "lock";
4026 const bool isAlive = calleeId->value_ == "alive";
4027 if (!isLock && !isAlive) {
4028 return false;
4029 }
4030

4032 node.params_[0]->isSpread || !node.params_[0]->name.empty()) {
4033 error(node.span, "'" + calleeId->value_ +
4034 "' expects exactly one positional argument.");
4035 return true;

4037

4039 bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[0]->value.get(), nullptr);
4040 if (!weakExpr) {
4041 return true;
4042 }
4043
4044 if (weakExpr->type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Class) {
4045 error(node.params_[0]->value->span,
4046 "'" + calleeId->value_ + "' expects a weak class reference.");
4047 return true;
4048 }
4049

4051 if (!weakClassType->isWeak()) {
4052 error(node.params_[0]->value->span,
4053 "'" + calleeId->value_ + "' expects a weak class reference.");
4054 return true;
4055 }
4056

4059 std::make_unique<BoundWeakAliveExpression>(std::move(weakExpr)));
4060 return true;
4061 }
4062
4063 auto strongType = std::make_shared<zir::ClassType>(*weakClassType);
4064 strongType->setWeak(false);
4065 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundWeakLockExpression>(
4066 std::move(weakExpr), strongType));
4067 return true;

1627 }

1629 return "signedness-changing integer conversion";
1630 }

595 litVal = "0.0";

600 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));

602
603 _diag.report(callSpan, zap::DiagnosticLevel::Warning,
604 "Generic function '" + instantiated->name +
605 "' has non-void return type but no return on some paths.");

607
608 boundRoot_->functions.push_back(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionDeclaration>(
609 instantiated, std::move(boundBody)));
610 genericInstantiationEmitted_[instantiated.get()] = true;
611
612 genericInstantiationInProgress_.pop_back();
613 return instantiated;

4730 }

4733
4734 // Integer promotion: preserve unsignedness when both operands are unsigned,
4735 // and choose width-aware integer kinds instead of always forcing Int64.
4736 if (isUnsignedIntegerType(t1) && isUnsignedIntegerType(t2)) {
4737 int width = std::max(typeBitWidth(t1), typeBitWidth(t2));
4738 if (width <= 8)

4740 if (width <= 16)
4741 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt16);
4742 if (width <= 32)

4746

4749 // (e.g. Int + UInt -> UInt, Int16 + UInt16 -> UInt16, Int + UInt64 -> UInt64)
4750 // - otherwise use signed, width-aware promotion.

4752 (isSignedIntegerType(t1) && isUnsignedIntegerType(t2))) {
4753 auto unsignedType = isUnsignedIntegerType(t1) ? t1 : t2;
4754 auto signedType = isUnsignedIntegerType(t1) ? t2 : t1;
4755
4756 int unsignedWidth = typeBitWidth(unsignedType);
4757 int signedWidth = typeBitWidth(signedType);
4758
4759 if (unsignedWidth >= signedWidth) {
4760 if (unsignedWidth <= 8)
4761 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt8);
4762 if (unsignedWidth <= 16)
4763 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt16);
4764 if (unsignedWidth <= 32)
4765 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt);
4766 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt64);
4767 }
4768
4769 int width = std::max(unsignedWidth, signedWidth);
4770 if (width <= 8)
4771 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int8);
4772 if (width <= 16)
4773 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int16);
4774 if (width <= 32)
4775 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int);
4776 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int64);
4777 }
4778
4779 // Both signed: keep signed result, width-aware.
4780 int width = std::max(typeBitWidth(t1), typeBitWidth(t2));
4781 if (width <= 8)
4782 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int8);
4783 if (width <= 16)
4784 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int16);
4785 if (width <= 32)

4787 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int64);

859 typeNode.qualifiedName() + "'.");
860 return nullptr;
861 }
862 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
863 mapped = mapType(*declParam->defaultType);
864 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
865 if (!mapped) {
866 error(declParam->defaultType->span,
867 "Unknown default generic type argument in type '" +
868 typeNode.qualifiedName() + "'.");

870 }
871 }

891 }
892 cacheKey += ">";
893
894 auto cachedIt = genericTypeInstantiations_.find(cacheKey);
895 if (cachedIt != genericTypeInstantiations_.end()) {
896 return cachedIt->second;
897 }
898
899 auto moduleIdIt = typeDeclarationModuleIds_.find(baseSymbol.get());
900 if (moduleIdIt == typeDeclarationModuleIds_.end()) {
901 error(typeNode.span,
902 "Internal error: missing module information for generic type '" +
903 baseSymbol->name + "'.");
904 return nullptr;
905 }
906
907 auto moduleIt = modules_.find(moduleIdIt->second);
908 if (moduleIt == modules_.end() || !moduleIt->second.info) {
909 error(typeNode.span,
910 "Internal error: missing declaration module for generic type '" +
911 baseSymbol->name + "'.");
912 return nullptr;
913 }
914

917 renderGenericTypeName(baseRecordType->getName(), genericArgs);
918 auto codegenName =
919 renderGenericCodegenName(baseRecordType->getCodegenName(), genericArgs);
920 if (classDecl) {
921 instantiatedType = std::make_shared<zir::ClassType>(displayName, codegenName);
922 } else {
923 instantiatedType = std::make_shared<zir::RecordType>(displayName, codegenName);
924 }
925 instantiatedType->setGenericInstance(baseRecordType->getName(),
926 baseRecordType->getCodegenName(),
927 genericArgs);
928
929 auto instantiatedSymbol = std::make_shared<TypeSymbol>(
930 baseSymbol->name, instantiatedType, codegenName, baseSymbol->moduleName,
931 baseSymbol->visibility, baseSymbol->isUnsafe, classDecl != nullptr);
932 instantiatedSymbol->isGenericInstantiation = true;
933 instantiatedSymbol->genericArguments = {
934 genericBindings.begin(), genericBindings.end()};
935 genericTypeInstantiations_[cacheKey] = instantiatedSymbol;
936
937 if (classDecl) {
938 auto instantiatedClassType =
939 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
940 ClassInfo classInfo;
941 classInfo.typeSymbol = instantiatedSymbol;
942 classInfo.classType = instantiatedClassType;
943 classInfo.ownerQualifiedName = instantiatedClassType->getName();
944 classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()] = classInfo;
945 }
946

948 int oldExternTypeContextDepth = externTypeContextDepth_;
949 auto oldScope = currentScope_;
950 auto oldModuleId = currentModuleId_;
951 if (structDecl && structDecl->isUnsafe_) {
952 ++unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
953 }
954 if (structDecl) {
955 ++externTypeContextDepth_;
956 }
957
958 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
959 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
960
961 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
962 if (classDecl && classDecl->baseType_) {
963 bool hasOwnCtor = false;
964 bool hasOwnDtor = false;
965 for (const auto &methodDecl : classDecl->methods_) {
966 hasOwnCtor = hasOwnCtor || methodDecl->name_ == "init";
967 hasOwnDtor = hasOwnDtor || methodDecl->name_ == "deinit";
968 }
969 auto baseType = mapType(*classDecl->baseType_);
970 if (baseType && baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
971 auto instantiatedClassType =
972 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
973 auto baseClass = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(baseType);
974 instantiatedClassType->setBase(baseClass);
975 auto &classInfo = classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()];
976 auto baseIt = classInfos_.find(baseClass->getName());
977 if (baseIt != classInfos_.end()) {
978 if (!hasOwnCtor) {
979 classInfo.constructor = baseIt->second.constructor;
980 }
981 if (!hasOwnDtor) {
982 classInfo.destructor = baseIt->second.destructor;
983 }
984 classInfo.fields = baseIt->second.fields;
985 classInfo.methods.insert(baseIt->second.methods.begin(),
986 baseIt->second.methods.end());
987 classInfo.nextVirtualSlot = baseIt->second.nextVirtualSlot;
988 }
989 for (const auto &field : baseClass->getFields()) {
990 instantiatedClassType->addField(field.name, field.type, field.visibility);
991 }
992 } else if (baseType) {
993 error(classDecl->baseType_->span, "Base type of class '" + classDecl->name_ +
994 "' must be a class.");
995 }
996 }
997
998 const auto &fields =
999 recordDecl ? recordDecl->fields_
1000 : (structDecl ? structDecl->fields_ : classDecl->fields_);
1001 for (const auto &field : fields) {
1002 auto fieldType = mapType(*field->type);
1003 if (!fieldType) {
1004 error(field->span, "Unknown type: " + field->type->qualifiedName());
1005 fieldType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1006 }
1007 instantiatedType->addField(field->name, fieldType,
1008 static_cast<int>(field->visibility_));
1009 if (classDecl) {
1010 auto instantiatedClassType =
1011 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
1012 auto &classInfo = classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()];
1013 classInfo.fields[field->name] = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
1014 field->name, fieldType, false, false, field->name,
1015 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, field->visibility_);
1016 }
1017 }
1018
1019 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1020
1021 unsafeTypeContextDepth_ = oldUnsafeTypeContextDepth;
1022 externTypeContextDepth_ = oldExternTypeContextDepth;
1023 currentScope_ = oldScope;
1024 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
1025
1026 if (classDecl) {
1027 auto instantiatedClassType =
1028 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
1029 auto &classInfo = classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()];
1030 auto oldScope = currentScope_;
1031 auto oldModuleId = currentModuleId_;
1032 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
1033 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
1034
1035 for (const auto &methodDecl : classDecl->methods_) {
1036 if (methodDecl->isUnsafe_) {
1037 requireUnsafeEnabled(methodDecl->span, "'unsafe fun'");
1038 ++unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
1039 }
1040
1041 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::shared_ptr<zir::Type>>
1042 methodGenericBindings;
1043 for (const auto &genericParam : methodDecl->genericParams_) {
1044 if (genericParam) {
1045 auto placeholder = std::make_shared<zir::RecordType>(
1046 genericParam->typeName, genericParam->typeName);
1047 methodGenericBindings[genericParam->typeName] = placeholder;
1048 }
1049 }
1050
1051 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<VariableSymbol>> params;
1052 if (!methodDecl->isStatic_) {
1053 params.push_back(std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
1054 "self", instantiatedClassType, false, false, "self",
1055 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, Visibility::Private));
1056 }
1057
1058 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
1059 if (!methodGenericBindings.empty()) {
1060 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(methodGenericBindings);
1061 }
1062 for (size_t i = 0; i < methodDecl->params_.size(); ++i) {
1063 const auto &p = methodDecl->params_[i];
1064 auto mappedType = mapType(*p->type);
1065 if (!mappedType) {
1066 error(p->span, "Unknown type: " + p->type->qualifiedName());
1067 mappedType =
1068 std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1069 }
1070 params.push_back(std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
1071 p->name, mappedType, false, p->isRef, p->name,
1072 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, Visibility::Private));
1073 }
1074
1075 std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> retType;
1076 bool isCtor = methodDecl->name_ == "init";
1077 bool isDtor = methodDecl->name_ == "deinit";
1078 if (isDtor && (!methodDecl->params_.empty() || methodDecl->returnType_)) {
1079 error(methodDecl->span,
1080 "Destructor 'deinit' cannot have parameters or a return type.");
1081 }
1082 if (isCtor || isDtor) {
1083 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1084 } else if (methodDecl->returnType_) {
1085 retType = mapType(*methodDecl->returnType_);
1086 } else {
1087 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1088 }
1089 if (!methodGenericBindings.empty()) {
1090 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1091 }
1092 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1093
1094 if (!retType) {
1095 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1096 }
1097
1098 if (methodDecl->isUnsafe_) {
1099 --unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
1100 }
1101
1102 auto methodSymbol = std::make_shared<FunctionSymbol>(
1103 methodDecl->name_, std::move(params), std::move(retType), "",
1104 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, methodDecl->visibility_,
1105 methodDecl->isUnsafe_);
1106 for (const auto &genericParam : methodDecl->genericParams_) {
1107 if (genericParam) {
1108 methodSymbol->genericParameterNames.push_back(genericParam->typeName);
1109 }
1110 }
1111 methodSymbol->isMethod = !methodDecl->isStatic_;
1112 methodSymbol->isStatic = methodDecl->isStatic_;
1113 methodSymbol->isConstructor = isCtor;
1114 methodSymbol->isDestructor = isDtor;
1115 methodSymbol->ownerTypeName = instantiatedClassType->getName();
1116 if (methodSymbol->isMethod && !methodSymbol->isStatic &&
1117 !methodSymbol->isConstructor && !methodSymbol->isDestructor) {
1118 auto existingIt = classInfo.methods.find(methodDecl->name_);
1119 if (existingIt != classInfo.methods.end()) {
1120 auto existingMethod =
1121 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionSymbol>(existingIt->second);
1122 if (existingMethod && existingMethod->vtableSlot >= 0) {
1123 methodSymbol->vtableSlot = existingMethod->vtableSlot;
1124 }
1125 }
1126 if (methodSymbol->vtableSlot < 0) {
1127 methodSymbol->vtableSlot = classInfo.nextVirtualSlot++;
1128 }
1129 }
1130 methodSymbol->linkName =
1131 mangleName(moduleIt->second.info->linkPath.empty()
1132 ? moduleIt->second.info->moduleId
1133 : moduleIt->second.info->linkPath,
1134 instantiatedClassType->getCodegenName() + "$" +
1135 methodDecl->name_ + "$" +
1136 sanitizeTypeName(functionSignatureKey(*methodSymbol)));
1137 functionDeclarationNodes_[methodSymbol.get()] = methodDecl.get();
1138 functionDeclarationModuleIds_[methodSymbol.get()] =
1139 moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
1140 functionGenericParamNames_[methodSymbol.get()] =
1141 methodSymbol->genericParameterNames;
1142 classInfo.methods[methodDecl->name_] = methodSymbol;
1143 if (isCtor) {
1144 classInfo.constructor = methodSymbol;
1145 } else if (isDtor) {
1146 classInfo.destructor = methodSymbol;
1147 }
1148
1149 if (!methodSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty() &&
1150 !methodSymbol->isGenericInstantiation) {
1151 continue;
1152 }
1153
1154 auto oldScope = currentScope_;
1155 auto oldFunction = currentFunction_;
1156 auto oldModuleId = currentModuleId_;
1157 auto oldClassStack = currentClassStack_;
1158 int oldUnsafeDepth = unsafeDepth_;
1159
1160 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
1161 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
1162 currentFunction_ = methodSymbol;
1163 currentClassStack_.push_back(instantiatedClassType->getName());
1164 if (methodSymbol->isUnsafe) {
1165 ++unsafeDepth_;
1166 }
1167
1168 pushScope();
1169 for (const auto &param : methodSymbol->parameters) {
1170 if (!currentScope_->declare(param->name, param)) {
1171 error(methodDecl->span,
1172 "Parameter '" + param->name + "' already declared.");
1173 }
1174 }
1175
1176 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
1177 auto boundBody = bindBody(methodDecl->body_.get(), false);
1178 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1179 popScope();
1180
1181 currentScope_ = oldScope;
1182 currentFunction_ = oldFunction;
1183 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
1184 currentClassStack_ = oldClassStack;
1185 unsafeDepth_ = oldUnsafeDepth;
1186
1187 bool hasReturn = false;
1188 if (boundBody) {
1189 if (boundBody->result)
1190 hasReturn = true;
1191 for (const auto &stmt : boundBody->statements) {
1192 if (dynamic_cast<BoundReturnStatement *>(stmt.get())) {
1193 hasReturn = true;
1194 break;
1195 }
1196 }
1197 }
1198
1199 if (!hasReturn &&
1200 methodSymbol->returnType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Void) {
1201 auto kind = methodSymbol->returnType->getKind();
1202 if (methodSymbol->returnType->isInteger() ||
1203 kind == zir::TypeKind::Float || kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
1204 std::string litVal = "0";
1205 if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Float)
1206 litVal = "0.0";
1207 else if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool)
1208 litVal = "false";
1209 auto lit =
1210 std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>(litVal, methodSymbol->returnType);
1211 boundBody->statements.push_back(
1212 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
1213 }
1214
1215 _diag.report(methodDecl->span, zap::DiagnosticLevel::Warning,
1216 "Function '" + methodDecl->name_ +
1217 "' has non-void return type but no return on some "
1218 "paths.");
1219 }
1220
1221 boundRoot_->functions.push_back(
1222 std::make_unique<BoundFunctionDeclaration>(methodSymbol,
1223 std::move(boundBody)));
1224 }
1225
1226 currentScope_ = oldScope;
1227 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
1228
1229 auto boundRecord = std::make_unique<BoundRecordDeclaration>();
1230 boundRecord->type = instantiatedClassType;
1231 boundRoot_->records.push_back(std::move(boundRecord));
1232 }
1233
1234 return instantiatedSymbol;
1235}

2313 module.info->moduleName == "fs" &&

2316 module.info->moduleName == "io" &&
2317 module.info->sourceName.find("/std/io.zp") != std::string::npos;

2319 module.info->moduleName == "path" &&

2322 linkName = "zap_fs_mkdir";
2323 } else if (isStdFsModule && extDecl->name_ == "remove") {
2324 linkName = "zap_fs_remove";
2325 } else if (isStdFsModule && extDecl->name_ == "rename") {
2326 linkName = "zap_fs_rename";
2327 } else if (isStdIoModule && extDecl->name_ == "printf") {
2328 linkName = "zap_printf";
2329 } else if (isStdIoModule && extDecl->name_ == "printfln") {
2330 linkName = "zap_printfln";
2331 } else if (isStdPathModule && extDecl->name_ == "basename") {

2333 }

2343 continue;

2369 }
2370 }

2372 if (!varDecl->isGlobal_) {

2404 mangleName(module.info->linkPath.empty() ? module.info->moduleId

2409 error(constDecl->span,
2410 "Identifier '" + constDecl->name_ + "' already declared.");

2412 module.symbol->members[constDecl->name_] = symbol;
2413 if (constDecl->visibility_ == Visibility::Public) {
2414 module.symbol->exports[constDecl->name_] = symbol;
2415 }

2913 isStringType(rightType) || rightType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Char;
2914 bool hasString = isStringType(leftType) || isStringType(rightType);
2915
2916 if (!leftOk || !rightOk || !hasString) {
2917 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2918 "Concatenation requires String and/or Char operands with at least "
2919 "one String, got '" +
2920 renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
2921 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
2922 }
2923 resultType = std::make_shared<zir::RecordType>("String", "String");
2924 } else if ((node.op_ == "+" || node.op_ == "-") &&
2925 (isPointerType(leftType) || isPointerType(rightType))) {
2926 requireUnsafeEnabled(node.span, "pointer arithmetic");
2927
2928 if (node.op_ == "+" && isPointerType(leftType) && rightType->isInteger()) {
2929 resultType = leftType;
2930 } else if (node.op_ == "+" && leftType->isInteger() &&
2931 isPointerType(rightType)) {
2932 std::swap(left, right);
2933 std::swap(leftType, rightType);
2934 resultType = leftType;
2935 } else if (node.op_ == "-" && isPointerType(leftType) &&
2936 rightType->isInteger()) {
2937 resultType = leftType;
2938 } else if (node.op_ == "-" && isPointerType(leftType) &&
2939 isPointerType(rightType)) {
2940 if (leftType->toString() != rightType->toString()) {
2941 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2942 "Pointer subtraction requires operands of the same type.");
2943 }
2944 resultType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int);
2945 } else {
2946 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2947 "Invalid pointer arithmetic between '" +
2948 renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
2949 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
2950 }
2951 } else if (node.op_ == "+" || node.op_ == "-" || node.op_ == "*" ||
2952 node.op_ == "/" || node.op_ == "%") {
2953 if (!isNumeric(leftType) || !isNumeric(rightType)) {
2954 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2955 "Operator '" + node.op_ + "' cannot be applied to '" +
2956 renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
2957 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
2958 } else {
2959 resultType = getPromotedType(leftType, rightType);
2960 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), resultType);
2961 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), resultType);
2962 }
2963 } else if (node.op_ == "&" || node.op_ == "|" || node.op_ == "^") {
2964 if (!leftType->isInteger() || !rightType->isInteger()) {
2965 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2966 "Bitwise operator '" + node.op_ +
2967 "' requires integer operands, got '" +
2968 renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
2969 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
2970 } else {
2971 resultType = getPromotedType(leftType, rightType);
2972 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), resultType);
2973 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), resultType);
2974 }
2975 } else if (node.op_ == "<<" || node.op_ == ">>") {
2976 if (!leftType->isInteger() || !rightType->isInteger()) {
2977 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2978 "Shift operator '" + node.op_ + "' requires integer operands, got '" +
2979 renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
2980 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
2981 } else {
2982 // Keep the left-hand integer type for shift results.
2983 resultType = leftType;
2984 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), resultType);
2985
2986 if (auto shiftAmount = evaluateConstantInt(right.get())) {
2987 if (*shiftAmount < 0) {
2988 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2989 "Shift amount must be non-negative, got '" +
2990 std::to_string(*shiftAmount) + "'.");
2991 } else {
2992 unsigned width =
2993 static_cast<unsigned>(typeBitWidth(resultType));
2994 if (width == 0 || static_cast<uint64_t>(*shiftAmount) >= width) {
2995 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
2996 "Shift amount '" + std::to_string(*shiftAmount) +
2997 "' is out of range for type '" +
2998 renderTypeForUser(resultType) + "' (" +
2999 std::to_string(width) + "-bit width).");
3000 }
3001 }
3002 }
3003 }
3004 } else if (node.op_ == "==" || node.op_ == "!=" || node.op_ == "<" ||
3005 node.op_ == "<=" || node.op_ == ">" || node.op_ == ">=") {
3006 bool classOrNullComparison =
3007 (leftType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class &&
3008 isNullType(rightType)) ||
3009 (rightType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class && isNullType(leftType));
3010 if (!classOrNullComparison &&
3011 (isPointerType(leftType) || isPointerType(rightType) ||
3012 isNullType(leftType) || isNullType(rightType))) {
3013 requireUnsafeEnabled(node.span, "pointer comparisons");
3014 }
3015
3016 // Reject comparisons of struct types
3017 if (leftType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Record ||
3018 rightType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Record) {
3019 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
3020 "Cannot compare struct types '" + renderTypeForUser(leftType) +
3021 "' and '" + renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
3022 }
3023
3024 if (!canConvert(leftType, rightType) && !canConvert(rightType, leftType)) {
3025 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
3026 "Cannot compare '" + renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
3027 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
3028 } else if (isNullType(leftType) && isPointerType(rightType)) {
3029 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), rightType);
3030 } else if (isNullType(rightType) && isPointerType(leftType)) {
3031 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), leftType);
3032 } else if (isNullType(leftType) &&
3033 rightType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
3034 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), rightType);
3035 } else if (isNullType(rightType) &&
3036 leftType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
3037 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), leftType);
3038 } else if ((leftType->isInteger() && rightType->isInteger()) ||
3039 (leftType->isFloatingPoint() && rightType->isFloatingPoint()) ||
3040 (leftType->isInteger() && rightType->isFloatingPoint()) ||
3041 (leftType->isFloatingPoint() && rightType->isInteger())) {
3042 auto promotedType = getPromotedType(leftType, rightType);
3043 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), promotedType);
3044 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), promotedType);
3045 }
3046 resultType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Bool);
3047 } else if (node.op_ == "&&" || node.op_ == "||") {
3048 if (leftType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Bool ||
3049 rightType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
3050 error(SourceSpan::merge(node.left_->span, node.right_->span),
3051 "Logical operator '" + node.op_ + "' requires Bool operands.");
3052 }
3053 resultType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Bool);
3054 }
3055
3056 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundBinaryExpression>(
3057 std::move(left), node.op_, std::move(right), resultType));
3058}

3397 } else {
3398 auto classType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(selfExpr->type);
3399 if (classType->isWeak()) {
3400 error(node.span,
3401 "Weak references cannot be used to call methods directly.");
3402 return;
3403 }
3404 auto infoIt = classInfos_.find(classType->getName());
3405 if (infoIt == classInfos_.end()) {
3406 error(node.span, "Unknown class type: " + classType->getName());
3407 return;
3408 }
3409 auto methodIt = infoIt->second.methods.find(member->member_);
3410 if (methodIt == infoIt->second.methods.end()) {
3411 error(node.span, "Class '" + classType->getName() +
3412 "' has no method '" + member->member_ + "'.");
3413 return;
3414 }
3415 auto funcSymbol =
3416 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionSymbol>(methodIt->second);
3417 if (!funcSymbol) {
3418 error(node.span, "'" + member->member_ + "' is not a method.");
3419 return;
3420 }
3421 bool methodAllowed =
3422 funcSymbol->visibility == Visibility::Public ||
3423 (!currentClassStack_.empty() &&
3424 currentClassStack_.back() == classType->getName()) ||
3425 (funcSymbol->visibility == Visibility::Protected &&
3426 !currentClassStack_.empty());
3427 if (!methodAllowed) {
3428 error(node.span, "Method '" + member->member_ + "' is not accessible.");
3429 return;
3430 }
3431 if (funcSymbol->isUnsafe) {
3432 requireUnsafeEnabled(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
3433 requireUnsafeContext(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
3434 }
3435
3436 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> rawArgs;
3437 rawArgs.reserve(node.params_.size());
3438 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
3439 auto arg = bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(), nullptr);
3440 if (!arg) {
3441 return;
3442 }
3443 rawArgs.push_back(std::move(arg));
3444 }
3445
3446 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
3447 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> inferenceArgs;
3448 if (funcSymbol->isMethod) {
3449 inferenceArgs.push_back(selfExpr->clone());
3450 }
3451 for (const auto &rawArg : rawArgs) {
3452 inferenceArgs.push_back(rawArg->clone());
3453 }
3454 std::string genericBindingFailure;
3455 auto genericBindings = buildGenericBindings(
3456 *funcSymbol, inferenceArgs, node.genericArgs_, node.span,
3457 &genericBindingFailure);
3458 if (genericBindings.empty()) {
3459 error(node.span, "No matching overload for method '" + member->member_ +
3460 "'. " +
3461 (genericBindingFailure.empty()
3462 ? std::string("Generic type binding failed.")
3463 : genericBindingFailure));
3464 return;
3465 }
3466 funcSymbol = ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation(
3467 funcSymbol, orderedGenericBindings(genericBindings), node.span);
3468 if (!funcSymbol) {
3469 error(node.span, "Failed to instantiate generic method '" +
3470 member->member_ + "'.");
3471 return;
3472 }
3473 } else if (!node.genericArgs_.empty()) {
3474 error(node.span, "Method '" + member->member_ +
3475 "' does not accept generic arguments.");
3476 return;
3477 }
3478
3479 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> args;
3480 std::vector<bool> argIsRef;
3481 if (funcSymbol->isMethod) {
3482 args.push_back(std::move(selfExpr));
3483 argIsRef.push_back(false);
3484 }
3485
3486 size_t paramOffset = funcSymbol->isMethod ? 1 : 0;
3487 if (node.params_.size() + paramOffset != funcSymbol->parameters.size()) {
3488 error(node.span,
3489 "No matching overload for method '" + member->member_ + "'.");
3490 return;
3491 }
3492
3493 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
3494 auto arg = rawArgs[i]->clone();
3495 auto expectedType = funcSymbol->parameters[i + paramOffset]->type;
3496 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
3497 error(node.params_[i]->value->span,
3498 "Cannot convert method argument from '" +
3499 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
3500 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'");
3501 return;
3502 }
3503 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
3504 args.push_back(std::move(arg));
3505 argIsRef.push_back(node.params_[i]->isRef);
3506 }
3507
3508 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionCall>(
3509 funcSymbol, std::move(args), std::move(argIsRef)));
3510 return;
3511 }
3512 }
3513
3514 std::vector<std::string> calleeParts;
3515 if (!node.callee_ || !extractQualifiedPath(node.callee_.get(), calleeParts)) {
3516 error(node.span, "Only direct function calls are supported.");
3517 return;
3518 }
3519
3520 auto symbol =
3521 resolveQualifiedSymbol(calleeParts, node.span, SymbolKind::Function);
3522 if (!symbol) {
3523 return;
3524 }
3525
3526 auto candidates = collectOverloads(symbol);
3527 if (candidates.empty()) {
3528 error(node.span, "'" + calleeParts.back() + "' is not a function.");
3529 return;
3530 }
3531
3532 bool seenSpreadArg = false;
3533 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> rawArgs;
3534 std::vector<bool> rawArgIsRef;
3535 std::vector<bool> rawArgIsSpread;
3536 std::vector<std::string> rawArgNames;
3537 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
3538 if (seenSpreadArg) {
3539 error(node.params_[i]->value->span,
3540 "Spread argument must be the last argument in a function call.");
3541 return;
3542 }
3543
3544 auto arg =
3545 bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(), nullptr);
3546 if (!arg)
3547 return;
3548 rawArgNames.push_back(node.params_[i]->name);
3549 rawArgIsRef.push_back(node.params_[i]->isRef);
3550 rawArgIsSpread.push_back(node.params_[i]->isSpread);
3551 if (node.params_[i]->isSpread) {
3552 seenSpreadArg = true;
3553 }
3554 rawArgs.push_back(std::move(arg));
3555 }
3556
3557 struct CandidateMatch {
3558 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> symbol;
3559 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> arguments;
3560 std::vector<bool> argumentIsRef;
3561 std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression> variadicPack;
3562 std::vector<int> cost;
3563 bool usedExtraArguments = false;
3564 int returnCost = 0;
3565 std::vector<std::string> notes;
3566 };
3567
3568 auto compareCost = [](const CandidateMatch &lhs, const CandidateMatch &rhs) {
3569 if (lhs.cost != rhs.cost) {
3570 return lhs.cost < rhs.cost;
3571 }
3572 if (lhs.returnCost != rhs.returnCost) {
3573 return lhs.returnCost < rhs.returnCost;
3574 }
3575 if (lhs.usedExtraArguments != rhs.usedExtraArguments) {
3576 return !lhs.usedExtraArguments && rhs.usedExtraArguments;
3577 }
3578 if (lhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments() !=
3579 rhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments()) {
3580 return !lhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
3581 rhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments();
3582 }
3583 return false;
3584 };
3585
3586 std::vector<CandidateMatch> matches;
3587 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> blockedUnsafeMatch = nullptr;
3588 std::vector<std::string> rejectionNotes;
3589 auto expectedReturnType = currentExpectedExpressionType();
3590
3591 for (const auto &funcSymbol : candidates) {
3592 if (!funcSymbol) {
3593 continue;
3594 }
3595
3596 size_t fixedParamCount = funcSymbol->fixedParameterCount();
3597 bool hasExplicitTypeArgs = !node.genericArgs_.empty();
3598 if (hasExplicitTypeArgs &&
3599 node.genericArgs_.size() > funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.size()) {
3600 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
3601 "': explicit generic argument count mismatch");
3602 continue;
3603 }
3604
3605 if (!hasExplicitTypeArgs && !funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
3606 // inference is allowed; no early rejection
3607 }
3608 if (!funcSymbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
3609 node.params_.size() != funcSymbol->parameters.size()) {
3610 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
3611 "': wrong argument count");
3612 continue;
3613 }
3614 if (funcSymbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
3615 node.params_.size() < fixedParamCount) {
3616 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
3617 "': too few arguments");
3618 continue;
3619 }
3620
3621 CandidateMatch match;
3622 match.symbol = funcSymbol;
3623 match.arguments.resize(fixedParamCount);
3624 match.argumentIsRef.resize(fixedParamCount, false);
3625 std::string genericBindingFailure;
3626 auto genericBindings = buildGenericBindings(
3627 *funcSymbol, rawArgs, node.genericArgs_, node.span,
3628 &genericBindingFailure);
3629 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty() && genericBindings.empty()) {
3630 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
3631 "': " + (genericBindingFailure.empty()
3632 ? "generic type binding failed"
3633 : genericBindingFailure));
3634 continue;
3635 }
3636 bool failed = false;
3637 std::string failureReason;
3638 auto variadicParam = funcSymbol->variadicParameter();
3639 std::vector<int> positionalToParameter(rawArgs.size(), -1);
3640 std::vector<bool> parameterAssigned(funcSymbol->parameters.size(), false);
3641 bool seenNamedArgument = false;
3642
3643 for (size_t i = 0, positionalIndex = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
3644 const bool isSpread = rawArgIsSpread[i];
3645 const bool isNamed = !rawArgNames[i].empty();
3646
3647 if (isSpread) {
3648 if (isNamed) {
3649 failed = true;
3650 failureReason = "named spread arguments are not supported";
3651 break;
3652 }
3653 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount);
3654 continue;
3655 }
3656
3657 if (isNamed) {
3658 seenNamedArgument = true;
3659 bool found = false;
3660 for (size_t paramIndex = 0; paramIndex < fixedParamCount;
3661 ++paramIndex) {
3662 if (funcSymbol->parameters[paramIndex]->name != rawArgNames[i]) {
3663 continue;
3664 }
3665 if (parameterAssigned[paramIndex]) {
3666 failed = true;
3667 failureReason =
3668 "parameter '" + rawArgNames[i] + "' provided more than once";
3669 break;
3670 }
3671 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(paramIndex);
3672 parameterAssigned[paramIndex] = true;
3673 found = true;
3674 break;
3675 }
3676 if (failed) {
3677 break;
3678 }
3679 if (!found) {
3680 failed = true;
3681 failureReason = "unknown named argument '" + rawArgNames[i] + "'";
3682 break;
3683 }
3684 continue;
3685 }
3686
3687 if (seenNamedArgument) {
3688 failed = true;
3689 failureReason = "positional arguments cannot follow named arguments";
3690 break;
3691 }
3692
3693 while (positionalIndex < fixedParamCount &&
3694 parameterAssigned[positionalIndex]) {
3695 ++positionalIndex;
3696 }
3697
3698 if (positionalIndex < fixedParamCount) {
3699 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(positionalIndex);
3700 parameterAssigned[positionalIndex] = true;
3701 ++positionalIndex;
3702 } else {
3703 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount);
3704 }
3705 }
3706
3707 if (!failed) {
3708 for (size_t paramIndex = 0; paramIndex < fixedParamCount; ++paramIndex) {
3709 if (!parameterAssigned[paramIndex]) {
3710 failed = true;
3711 failureReason = "missing argument for parameter '" +
3712 funcSymbol->parameters[paramIndex]->name + "'";
3713 break;
3714 }
3715 }
3716 }
3717
3718 for (size_t i = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
3719 auto arg = rawArgs[i]->clone();
3720 bool argIsRef = rawArgIsRef[i];
3721 bool argIsSpread = rawArgIsSpread[i];
3722 int parameterIndex = positionalToParameter[i];
3723
3724 if (failed) {
3725 break;
3726 }
3727
3728 if (argIsSpread) {
3729 if (parameterIndex < static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount) || argIsRef ||
3730 !funcSymbol->hasVariadicParameter()) {
3731 failed = true;
3732 failureReason =
3733 "spread arguments can only target a Zap variadic parameter";
3734 break;
3735 }
3736
3737 if (!variadicParam || !variadicParam->variadic_element_type) {
3738 failed = true;
3739 failureReason = "internal error: missing variadic parameter type";
3740 break;
3741 }
3742
3743 auto expectedViewType =
3744 makeVariadicViewType(variadicParam->variadic_element_type);
3745
3746 if (arg->type && arg->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Array) {
3747 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedViewType)) {
3748 failed = true;
3749 failureReason =
3750 "spread argument type does not match variadic parameter";
3751 break;
3752 }
3753 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedViewType);
3754 } else if (!arg->type || !isVariadicViewType(arg->type) ||
3755 !canConvert(arg->type, expectedViewType)) {
3756 failed = true;
3757 failureReason =
3758 "spread argument type does not match variadic parameter";
3759 break;
3760 }
3761
3762 match.variadicPack = std::move(arg);
3763 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
3764 match.notes.push_back("spread -> variadic pack");
3765 continue;
3766 }
3767
3768 if (parameterIndex >= 0 &&
3769 parameterIndex < static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount)) {
3770 auto expectedType = funcSymbol->parameters[parameterIndex]->type;
3771 if (!genericBindings.empty()) {
3772 expectedType = substituteGenericType(expectedType, genericBindings);
3773 }
3774 const auto &parameter = funcSymbol->parameters[parameterIndex];
3775 if (argIsRef != parameter->is_ref) {
3776 failed = true;
3777 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
3778 "' has mismatched ref-ness";
3779 break;
3780 }
3781
3782 if (argIsRef) {
3783 auto varExpr = dynamic_cast<BoundVariableExpression *>(arg.get());
3784 if (!varExpr || arg->type->toString() != expectedType->toString()) {
3785 failed = true;
3786 failureReason = "ref argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
3787 "' must exactly match type '" +
3788 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
3789 break;
3790 }
3791 match.cost.push_back(0);
3792 match.notes.push_back("param " + parameter->name +
3793 ": exact ref match");
3794 } else if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
3795 failed = true;
3796 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
3797 "' is not convertible from '" +
3798 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
3799 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
3800 break;
3801 } else {
3802 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, expectedType);
3803 if (cost >= 1000) {
3804 failed = true;
3805 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
3806 "' is not convertible from '" +
3807 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
3808 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
3809 break;
3810 }
3811 match.cost.push_back(cost);
3812 match.notes.push_back("param " + parameter->name + ": " +
3813 describeConversion(arg->type, expectedType));
3814 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
3815 }
3816 match.argumentIsRef[parameterIndex] = argIsRef;
3817 match.arguments[parameterIndex] = std::move(arg);
3818 } else if (funcSymbol->hasVariadicParameter()) {
3819 if (argIsRef) {
3820 failed = true;
3821 failureReason = "variadic arguments cannot be passed by ref";
3822 break;
3823 }
3824 auto expectedType = variadicParam->variadic_element_type;
3825 if (!genericBindings.empty()) {
3826 expectedType = substituteGenericType(expectedType, genericBindings);
3827 }
3828 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
3829 failed = true;
3830 failureReason = "variadic argument is not convertible from '" +
3831 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
3832 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
3833 break;
3834 }
3835 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, expectedType);
3836 match.cost.push_back(cost);
3837 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
3838 match.notes.push_back("variadic: " +
3839 describeConversion(arg->type, expectedType));
3840 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
3841 match.argumentIsRef.push_back(false);
3842 match.arguments.push_back(std::move(arg));
3843 } else if (funcSymbol->isCVariadic) {
3844 if (argIsRef) {
3845 failed = true;
3846 failureReason = "C variadic arguments cannot be passed by ref";
3847 break;
3848 }
3849 auto promotedType = getCVariadicArgumentType(arg->type);
3850 if (!promotedType) {
3851 failed = true;
3852 failureReason = "type '" + renderTypeForUser(arg->type) +
3853 "' is not supported in C variadic arguments";
3854 break;
3855 }
3856 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, promotedType);
3857 match.cost.push_back(cost);
3858 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
3859 match.notes.push_back("c variadic: " +
3860 describeConversion(arg->type, promotedType));
3861 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), promotedType);
3862 match.argumentIsRef.push_back(false);
3863 match.arguments.push_back(std::move(arg));
3864 } else {
3865 failed = true;
3866 failureReason = "too many arguments";
3867 break;
3868 }
3869 }
3870
3871 if (failed) {
3872 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
3873 "': " + failureReason);
3874 continue;
3875 }
3876
3877 if (expectedReturnType) {
3878 if (funcSymbol->returnType->toString() ==
3879 expectedReturnType->toString()) {
3880 match.returnCost = 0;
3881 match.notes.push_back("return: exact match");
3882 } else if (canConvert(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType)) {
3883 match.returnCost =
3884 conversionCost(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType);
3885 match.notes.push_back(
3886 "return: " +
3887 describeConversion(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType));
3888 } else {
3889 match.returnCost = 50;
3890 match.notes.push_back("return: incompatible with expected " +
3891 renderTypeForUser(expectedReturnType));
3892 }
3893 }
3894
3895 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> resolvedSymbol = funcSymbol;
3896 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
3897 resolvedSymbol = ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation(
3898 funcSymbol, orderedGenericBindings(genericBindings), node.span);
3899 if (!resolvedSymbol) {
3900 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
3901 "': failed to instantiate generic function");
3902 continue;
3903 }
3904
3905 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> remappedArgs;
3906 std::vector<bool> remappedRef;
3907 remappedArgs.reserve(match.arguments.size());
3908 remappedRef.reserve(match.argumentIsRef.size());
3909
3910 for (size_t i = 0; i < match.arguments.size(); ++i) {
3911 auto argClone = match.arguments[i] ? match.arguments[i]->clone() : nullptr;
3912 if (i < resolvedSymbol->parameters.size() && argClone) {
3913 auto expected = resolvedSymbol->parameters[i]->type;
3914 if (!resolvedSymbol->parameters[i]->is_ref) {
3915 argClone = wrapInCast(std::move(argClone), expected);
3916 }
3917 }
3918 remappedArgs.push_back(std::move(argClone));
3919 remappedRef.push_back(i < match.argumentIsRef.size()
3920 ? match.argumentIsRef[i]
3921 : false);
3922 }
3923
3924 match.arguments = std::move(remappedArgs);
3925 match.argumentIsRef = std::move(remappedRef);
3926 match.symbol = resolvedSymbol;
3927 }
3928
3929 if (resolvedSymbol->isUnsafe && !isUnsafeActive()) {
3930 blockedUnsafeMatch = resolvedSymbol;
3931 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*resolvedSymbol) +
3932 "': requires unsafe context");
3933 continue;
3934 }
3935 matches.push_back(std::move(match));
3936 }
3937
3938 if (matches.empty()) {
3939 if (blockedUnsafeMatch) {
3940 requireUnsafeEnabled(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
3941 requireUnsafeContext(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
3942 return;
3943 }
3944
3945 error(
3946 node.callee_->span,
3947 "No matching overload for function '" + calleeParts.back() + "'. " +
3948 (rejectionNotes.empty() ? std::string() : ("Candidates: " + [&]() {
3949 std::string details;
3950 for (size_t i = 0; i < rejectionNotes.size(); ++i) {
3951 if (i != 0) {
3952 details += "; ";
3953 }
3954 details += rejectionNotes[i];
3955 }
3956 return details;
3957 }())));
3958 return;
3959 }
3960
3961 size_t bestIndex = 0;
3962 for (size_t i = 1; i < matches.size(); ++i) {
3963 if (compareCost(matches[i], matches[bestIndex])) {
3964 bestIndex = i;
3965 }
3966 }
3967
3968 std::vector<size_t> ambiguous = {bestIndex};
3969 for (size_t i = 0; i < matches.size(); ++i) {
3970 if (i == bestIndex) {
3971 continue;
3972 }
3973 if (!compareCost(matches[i], matches[bestIndex]) &&
3974 !compareCost(matches[bestIndex], matches[i])) {
3975 ambiguous.push_back(i);
3976 }
3977 }
3978
3979 if (ambiguous.size() > 1) {
3980 std::string message =
3981 "Call to function '" + calleeParts.back() + "' is ambiguous between ";
3982 for (size_t i = 0; i < ambiguous.size(); ++i) {
3983 if (i != 0) {
3984 message += i + 1 == ambiguous.size() ? " and " : ", ";
3985 }
3986 message +=
3987 "'" + renderFunctionSignature(*matches[ambiguous[i]].symbol) + "'";
3988 }
3989 message += ".";
3990 if (expectedReturnType) {
3991 message +=
3992 " Expected result type: '" + expectedReturnType->toString() + "'.";
3993 }
3994 message += " Candidate details: ";
3995 for (size_t i = 0; i < ambiguous.size(); ++i) {
3996 if (i != 0) {
3997 message += "; ";
3998 }
3999 message +=
4000 "'" + renderFunctionSignature(*matches[ambiguous[i]].symbol) + "' [";
4001 for (size_t j = 0; j < matches[ambiguous[i]].notes.size(); ++j) {
4002 if (j != 0) {
4003 message += ", ";
4004 }
4005 message += matches[ambiguous[i]].notes[j];
4006 }
4007 message += "]";
4008 }
4009 error(node.callee_->span, message);
4010 return;
4011 }
4012
4013 auto &best = matches[bestIndex];
4014 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionCall>(
4015 best.symbol, std::move(best.arguments), std::move(best.argumentIsRef),
4016 std::move(best.variadicPack)));
4017}
FunCall::genericArgs_
std::vector< std::unique_ptr< TypeNode > > genericArgs_
Definition fun_call.hpp:20
sema::Binder::bindWeakBuiltinCall
bool bindWeakBuiltinCall(FunCall &node)

sema::Binder::orderedGenericBindings
std::vector< std::pair< std::string, std::shared_ptr< zir::Type > > > orderedGenericBindings(const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::shared_ptr< zir::Type > > &genericBindings) const
Definition binder.cpp:786
sema::Binder::getCVariadicArgumentType
std::shared_ptr< zir::Type > getCVariadicArgumentType(std::shared_ptr< zir::Type > type)
Definition binder.cpp:4791
sema::Binder::ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation
std::shared_ptr< FunctionSymbol > ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation(const std::shared_ptr< FunctionSymbol > &baseFunction, const std::vector< std::pair< std::string, std::shared_ptr< zir::Type > > > &genericBindings, SourceSpan callSpan)
Definition binder.cpp:389
sema::Binder::describeConversion

sema::Binder::renderFunctionSignature

Definition binder.cpp:321
sema::Binder::buildGenericBindings
std::unordered_map< std::string, std::shared_ptr< zir::Type > > buildGenericBindings(const FunctionSymbol &function, const std::vector< std::unique_ptr< BoundExpression > > &arguments, const std::vector< std::unique_ptr< TypeNode > > &explicitTypeArgs, SourceSpan callSpan, std::string *failureReason=nullptr)
Definition binder.cpp:1246
sema::anonymous_namespace{binder.cpp}::extractQualifiedPath
bool extractQualifiedPath(const ExpressionNode *expr, std::vector< std::string > &parts)
Definition binder.cpp:92
Visibility::Protected

2631 std::string litVal = "0";

2633 litVal = "0.0";
2634 else if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool)
2635 litVal = "false";

2637 boundBody->statements.push_back(
2638 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
